message:
feat(core): expand eval_scalar_fn with 20+ common SQLite functions (bd-3jmk)

Add typeof, iif, max, min, replace, substr/substring, instr, trim,
ltrim, rtrim, hex, quote, unicode, char, random, zeroblob, round,
sign, concat, concat_ws, sqlite_version, likely/unlikely, and
total_changes/changes/last_insert_rowid stubs to the connection.rs
fallback expression evaluator used by JOIN and GROUP BY paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
